prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they were GREEN or RED. Did being GREEN or RED make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did color matter to the fertility of reptiles?

feedback_text.text: That was fun. I did not notice any differences in the feet. I guess I only noticed the body color change. I just thought they were the same pictures that varied in color, and maybe size.
